title: MicroBreaks - Focus & Wellness
subtitle: Smart Breaks for Healthy Work
description:
MicroBreaks helps you stay healthy during long work sessions with guided micro-break exercises, a smart Pomodoro timer, and personalized wellness recommendations.

--- SMART FOCUS TIMER ---
Built-in Pomodoro timer with customizable presets: Classic (25/5), Deep Work (50/10), and Micro Sessions (15/2). Auto-transitions between work and break phases keep you in flow.

--- 40+ GUIDED EXERCISES ---
Guided exercises for eyes, neck, back, wrists, and full body. Each exercise includes step-by-step voice guidance and animations.

--- PERSONALIZED FOR YOU ---
Tell us about your work style and pain areas during onboarding. Our recommendation engine creates a personalized break plan just for you.

--- TRACK YOUR PROGRESS ---
Daily streaks, XP levels, achievements, and detailed statistics keep you motivated. See your wellness journey at a glance.

--- KEY FEATURES ---
• Pomodoro/focus timer with 3 built-in presets + custom
• 40+ guided break exercises (stretch, mindful, active, quick)
• Smart break recommendations based on your profile
• Push notification reminders
• Dark & light themes
• Cloud sync across devices
• Streak tracking & gamification
• Full accessibility support
• Available in English and Turkish

Start building healthier work habits today. Your body will thank you.
promotional_text: New: Smart Focus Timer with Pomodoro presets! Stay productive and healthy.
